title: Filled In Vaults
description: No peeking! The see-through gaps in trial vaults are filled in
body:
- No peeking! **The see-through gaps in trial vaults are filled in**.

- You will still see the particles as only the textures have been modified.

- I made this pack because I thought it was weird how the items popped in and out of existence in a see-through vault. Besides, the myth of "timing" your vault opening is indeed just a myth. It'll be a better surprise this time.

***

![GIF of textures for opening a trial vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f14add3259bc3237c89e29e2873e4bb368f4605.gif) ![GIF of textures for opening an ominous vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3c9a34c1a8031b21e36d86055feedbf13b5ee1e.gif)

GIF of textures for opening the vaults
